claims.claim: ViscosityShift, StructuralSolidification, and Persistence should be represented as a continuous solidification gradient, not only mutually exclusive ExperienceDeltaKindV1 categories.
The current settled foothold may be reinforced by factors outside the fixed resonance-stability constants.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/types.rs: resonance stability context keeps weights and foothold visible

claims.claim: Changing resonance-stability weights or making the solidification gradient persistent/live-facing would alter report semantics and needs approval.
